
func (s *Server) handlePageSettingsPOSTReset(
	w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request,
) {
	if !s.checkIsDSReq(w, r) {
		return
	}

	sse := datastar.NewSSE(w, r, datastar.WithCompression())
	p := testapp.PageSettings{
	App: s.app,
}
	err := p.POSTReset(sse)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, sse, "handling action PageSettings.Reset", err)
		return
	}
}
